action_center.remediation: Run the release candidate gate locally, fix the first failing release blocker or frontend gate, then rerun the Release Candidate Gate workflow.
Run the Ruff blocking and format checks locally, fix E/F/import/format findings in `src/` and `tests/`, then rerun the Lint workflow.
Open the Semgrep artifact and workflow log, remediate reported SAST or secret findings, and rerun Security Scan.
Open the Bandit artifact, review high-confidence findings against `pyproject.toml` skips, fix real issues or document justified suppressions, then rerun Security Scan.
Run `pip-audit` against the project requirements, upgrade vulnerable packages or add an explicit justified advisory disposition, then rerun Security Scan.
Verify ACR/Docker credentials, rebuild the scan image, review Docker Scout high/critical CVEs, update the base image or dependencies, then rerun Security Scan.
Run the dry-run command, review the diff, and apply only with owner approval.

shortcut.label: Copy dry-run command
shortcut.target: python -c "from groundtruth_kb.cli import main; main()" project upgrade --dry-run --dir .

action_center.action: GTKB-GOV-010: Maintain standing backlog harvest audit as release-gate input
action_center.remediation: Execute or disposition through the governed backlog/bridge process.

infrastructure.scope_note: Infrastructure is reported separately from primary Agent Red product KPIs.

accessibility_axe.remediation: Open `a11y-results.xml`, reproduce the affected Playwright/axe test locally, fix critical or serious WCAG violations, then rerun Accessibility.

gaps: No GitHub Actions workflow currently wires admin ESLint as an automated gate.
admin_eslint.latest_run_summary: Manual/local capability; no GitHub Actions run expected.
admin_eslint.remediation: Run the admin ESLint script locally, fix TypeScript/React/a11y lint findings, and consider wiring it into CI if it gates release readiness.

bandit.remediation: Open the Bandit artifact, review high-confidence findings against `pyproject.toml` skips, fix real issues or document justified suppressions, then rerun Security Scan.

gaps: CHROMATIC_PROJECT_TOKEN presence cannot be verified from local files.
chromatic.latest_run_summary: No recent run returned by gh.
chromatic.remediation: Verify `CHROMATIC_PROJECT_TOKEN`, inspect the Chromatic build for visual diffs or build errors, accept intentional baselines or fix regressions, then rerun Chromatic.

evidence: API gateway, slim gateway, agent container, and test-host workflows present
gaps: ACR credential state cannot be verified from local files.
container_builds.gate_role: Build and publish deployable/test container images.
container_builds.latest_run_summary: Configuration detected; no single workflow run is associated.
container_builds.remediation: Inspect the failed container build log, verify ACR credentials and Dockerfile paths, rebuild the target image locally, then rerun the affected build workflow.

gaps: No Pact workflow or broker/report integration found.
contract_testing.latest_run_summary: Manual/local capability; no GitHub Actions run expected.
contract_testing.remediation: Add or run Pact contract verification for widget/provider boundaries and publish pact results or broker status before treating this as an automated gate.

dependabot.gate_role: Dependency freshness automation across package ecosystems.
dependabot.latest_run_summary: Configuration detected; no single workflow run is associated.
dependabot.remediation: Inspect failing Dependabot update PR checks, update constraints or lockfiles as needed, and close superseded dependency PRs once a clean update lands.

gaps: ACR credentials cannot be verified from local files.
docker_scout.gate_role: Container CVE gate for high and critical findings.
docker_scout.remediation: Verify ACR/Docker credentials, rebuild the scan image, review Docker Scout high/critical CVEs, update the base image or dependencies, then rerun Security Scan.

docs_quality.gate_role: Documentation build, lint, link, and coverage checks.
docs_quality.remediation: Run the docs build, prose lint, markdown lint, link check, and coverage audit locally; fix broken links or missing coverage before rerunning Docs Quality.

github.gate_role: Parent CI runner and repository service for automated release evidence.
github.latest_run_summary: 7 required main workflow runs checked; health=passing
github.remediation: Open the latest failing required workflow runs, fix the child gate rows they identify, then rerun the failed workflows from GitHub Actions.
github.state_source: AGENT_RED_GITHUB_REPO or local git remote, .github/workflows, local harness plugin cache, gh CLI status, and gh run list when available

gaps: No GitHub Actions workflow currently wires this as an automated gate.
locust_performance.gate_role: Manual/local load and latency testing capability.
locust_performance.latest_run_summary: Manual/local capability; no GitHub Actions run expected.
locust_performance.remediation: If performance evidence is required, run the Locust profile against the intended environment and publish the latency/error summary into release evidence.

gaps: No GitHub Actions workflow currently publishes mutation score.
mutation_testing.latest_run_summary: Manual/local capability; no GitHub Actions run expected.
mutation_testing.remediation: Run mutation testing on changed modules, strengthen assertions for surviving mutants, and record the mutation score in session or release evidence.

openapi_compatibility.remediation: Inspect the OpenAPI compatibility job output, confirm whether schema changes are intentional, then either restore compatibility or document/version the breaking API change.

pip_audit.remediation: Run `pip-audit` against the project requirements, upgrade vulnerable packages or add an explicit justified advisory disposition, then rerun Security Scan.

property_testing.latest_run_summary: Manual/local capability; no GitHub Actions run expected.
property_testing.remediation: Use Hypothesis for changed logic with broad input space, then run the relevant property-marked pytest target and capture failures as regression tests.

pytest_coverage.gate_role: Primary regression test and line-coverage gate.
pytest_coverage.remediation: Inspect the pytest shard and merged coverage artifacts, reproduce the failing shard locally, then restore the configured coverage threshold before rerunning Python Tests.

release_candidate_gate.gate_role: Top-level release readiness command for Python and frontend gates.
release_candidate_gate.remediation: Run the release candidate gate locally, fix the first failing release blocker or frontend gate, then rerun the Release Candidate Gate workflow.

ruff_lint_format.gate_role: Static Python correctness and formatting gate.
ruff_lint_format.remediation: Run the Ruff blocking and format checks locally, fix E/F/import/format findings in `src/` and `tests/`, then rerun the Lint workflow.

gaps: No GitHub Actions workflow currently wires Schemathesis as an automated gate.
schemathesis_api.latest_run_summary: Manual/local capability; no GitHub Actions run expected.
schemathesis_api.remediation: Run Schemathesis against the current OpenAPI schema and target service, triage generated failures, then decide whether to promote it into CI.

semgrep_sast.remediation: Open the Semgrep artifact and workflow log, remediate reported SAST or secret findings, and rerun Security Scan.

gaps: SONAR_TOKEN presence cannot be verified from local files.
sonarcloud.gate_role: External code quality and coverage ingestion service.
sonarcloud.remediation: Verify the `SONAR_TOKEN` secret, Sonar project key, and organization, then inspect the SonarCloud run log or quality gate and rerun after configuration is repaired.

gaps: Workflow is dispatch-only until baseline enforcement phase.
visual_regression.latest_run_summary: No recent run returned by gh.
visual_regression.remediation: Review generated screenshot artifacts, compare unexpected diffs against intended UI behavior, update baselines only after review, then rerun Visual Regression.

top_priority_actions.body:
**Priority:** TOP. The standing backlog cannot be considered fully populated without a repeatable harvest check over bridge status, MemBase work items, release-readiness blockers, and independent progress artifacts.

**Required outcome:** keep `scripts/audit_standing_backlog_sources.py`, `tests/scripts/test_standing_backlog_harvest.py`, and `independent-progress-assessments/CODEX-INSIGHT-DROPBOX/STANDING-BACKLOG-HARVEST-2026-04-20.md` current until GT-KB provides a first-class standing-backlog doctor. Future sessions should update the harvest report or supersede it with a structured snapshot when source counts change materially.

**Regression visibility:** release-candidate gate runs the standing backlog harvest test.
top_priority_actions.title: Maintain standing backlog harvest audit as release-gate input

contention.source_authority: live bridge/INDEX.md is the sole authoritative bridge queue source

plugins.source: local harness plugin cache when present

role.bridge: always available through bridge/INDEX.md and checked at session startup
role.poller: activate only when Prime Builder and Loyal Opposition run in separate harnesses or asynchronous monitoring is needed
role.role_assignment: active AI harness assigned by owner through durable operating-role record

notes: no current session overlay; startup context is sourced from live files

skills.source: project .claude/skills plus local harness skill directories

token_reduction_options: Use the dashboard link before loading large artifacts into context.
Read indices and summaries first; open full artifacts only when needed.
Load only the specific skill body required for the current turn.
Use cached startup snapshots for stable KPI instead of re-scanning everything.
Propose explicit governance relaxation only when the audit trail can preserve the tradeoff.

top_priority_actions.body:
**Priority:** TOP. The standing backlog cannot be considered fully populated without a repeatable harvest check over bridge status, MemBase work items, release-readiness blockers, and independent progress artifacts.

**Required outcome:** keep `scripts/audit_standing_backlog_sources.py`, `tests/scripts/test_standing_backlog_harvest.py`, and `independent-progress-assessments/CODEX-INSIGHT-DROPBOX/STANDING-BACKLOG-HARVEST-2026-04-20.md` current until GT-KB provides a first-class standing-backlog doctor. Future sessions should update the harvest report or supersede it with a structured snapshot when source counts change materially.

**Regression visibility:** release-candidate gate runs the standing backlog harvest test.
top_priority_actions.title: Maintain standing backlog harvest audit as release-gate input
